external_references.description: Charlie Eriksen. (2025, September 16). S1ngularity/nx attackers strike again. Retrieved April 9, 2026.
Gianpietro Cutolo. (2025, November 26). Shai-Hulud 2.0: Aggressive, Automated, and Fast Spreading. Retrieved April 9, 2026.
Socket Research Team. (2025, November 24). Shai Hulud Strikes Again (v2). Retrieved April 9, 2026.

objects.description: [Shai-Hulud](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9008) has gathered secrets from AWS Secrets and GCP Secret Manager.(Citation: Aikido Shai-Hulud September 2025)(Citation: Netskope Shai-Hulud November 2025)(Citation: Socket Shai-Hulud November 2025) [Shai-Hulud](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9008) has also gathered data from Azure Key Vault.(Citation: Netskope Shai-Hulud November 2025)(Citation: Socket Shai-Hulud November 2025)
